name: Johnson Bus Svc
owner_or_parent: Landmark Student Transportation (US HQ Dousman, WI; backed by CC&L Infrastructure)
principals: Steve Johnson, Dan Johnson, Judy Holzmann (former 3rd-gen owners, transitioned to advisory roles); Aaron W. Johnson (founder 1942)
districts_or_customers: 14 school districts across southeast Wisconsin; 10 terminal locations including West Bend (HQ), Beaver Dam, Campbellsport, Cedar Grove, Fond du Lac, Horicon, Kewaskum, Menomonee Falls, Oakfield, Plymouth, Port Washington
recent_news: Acquired by Canada-based Landmark Student Transportation in Feb 2019 after 77 years of Johnson-family ownership; Landmark retained the Johnson Bus brand and existing teams.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target: owned by Landmark Student Transportation (CC&L Infrastructure-backed strategic). Already part of a consolidator platform competing in Summit's lane.

name: M & M Bus Inc
owner_or_parent: unknown (record lists Marcus Johnson at 720 Kings 7th W, Brooklyn)
principals: Marcus Johnson (per address record; unconfirmed as owner)
districts_or_customers: Likely NYC OPT (NYC DOE Office of Pupil Transportation) if operating — not confirmed on the OPT approved vendor list searches; no website found
recent_news: No public news, M&A activity, or web presence found; not located on NYC OPT vendor list in searches.
fit_notes: Insufficient verification — possibly a very small / inactive / non-NYC-OPT-approved operator. Low priority pending confirmation it is a real, active school-bus operator (vs. a charter or dormant entity).

name: Dimino Bus Svc
principals: Robert Dimino (Principal/Owner); operates as DiMino Bus Transportation, Inc. d/b/a Safe Coach Bus, Inc.
districts_or_customers: Brooklyn-based; historically provides school/charter round-trip transportation (e.g., camp routes such as Poly Summer); not on confirmed NYC OPT large-vendor list
recent_news: Yelp listing marked CLOSED as of Feb 2026 (1045 Rockaway Ave); BBB profile still active for DiMino Bus Transportation/Safe Coach Bus at 1040 Rockaway Ave; operating status unclear.
fit_notes: Small Brooklyn family operator with potential succession/closure signal; verify operating status before pursuit. If still active, likely too sub-scale for Summit (NYC OPT contracting environment is also a hurdle).

name: Eagle Valley Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Centre County, PA — likely serves Bald Eagle Area School District (Milesburg/Bellefonte area) and/or Bellefonte Area SD; intrastate school-bus operator only
recent_news: No M&A or news found. FMCSA SAFER shows active intrastate school-bus operator, USDOT 1244732, registered address 488 Old Curtin Rd, Milesburg, PA (near Bellefonte). FMCSA-reported power units/drivers appear understated (1/1) vs ~49 employees — typical of small school-bus carriers reporting only road-tractor units.
fit_notes: Plausible Summit tuck-in: small, independent, family-owned PA contractor in Centre County. Female president (Trudy Reese) could indicate later-stage ownership with succession optionality. Fleet likely 15-30 buses; worth a direct outreach call.

name: Ashland & Shamokin Auto Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Northumberland/Schuylkill County, PA — likely Mount Carmel Area SD, Shamokin Area SD, Line Mountain SD, North Schuylkill SD area
recent_news: No M&A or recent news found. Historic operator dating to 1936 (took over Shamokin & Mount Carmel Electric Railway trolley routes). Yelp listing active as of Feb 2026.
fit_notes: Attractive Summit tuck-in candidate: ~90-year-old independent, owner-operated PA school-bus contractor in coal-region PA; classic family-business succession profile. Worth direct outreach to Bob Else.
